bead.title: refactor(svelte): personas + documents pages have stale-initializer pattern
bead.description:
Opus Stage 4 batch review (2026-04-15): personas/+page.svelte:7 and documents/[...path]/+page.svelte:12 both have the stale-initializer pattern — let selected = $state(data.x ?? ''). svelte-check flags both as state_referenced_locally.

Selected persona won't refresh on project change, and document content doesn't reset after navigation between documents. Fix: use $derived or wrap call sites in {#key}.
bead.acceptance: (1) bun run check 0 warnings for both files. (2) Navigating between personas/documents updates the rendered state. (3) Existing behavior preserved.
